channel.title: Home on Tiny Roosters
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Tiny Roosters

item.title: Second
item.description:
Let’s start here

item.title: Unicorns vs Triangles
item.description: Triangles are attacking the home world of the Unicorns. How long can you defend them!?

item.title: Initial Post
item.description:
Low content

This is my first post. However, I do not have much to talk about. This does help give me some content to work out the design I want. So that’s cool.

This is the second paragraph for my first post.

item.title: About
item.description:
I’m Lee, solo developer behind Tiny Roosters. I’ll be making games and talking about them here. Feel free to get in touch.

Tools

  • Godot (GDScript)
  • VSCode
  • Git
  • Windows Terminal
  • WSL2
